title: Prince and Prince
overview: Yoi, who has been deemed a Prince her whole life, collides with a type of boy she's never met before.

title: The Evening Downpour and the Cat
overview: Yoi continues to struggle in understanding Kohaku's intentions when a sudden downpour gives her a chance.

title: Unawareness
overview: Yoi and Kohaku agree to do an "experiment," to find out where their relationship will take them, when...

title: Temperature of Love
overview: Regardless of their agreement, Kohaku pushes his limits with Yoi as they both try to sort their feelings.

title: The Side of Me I Don't Know
overview: Battling her contradicting feelings, Yoi slowly starts to open up and face the truth.

title: I'm Just Jealous Is All
overview: Kohaku felt pretty confident until his buddy planted a doubt in his mind. Will it get to him?

title: You on the Night of the Festival
overview: With the tension rising between the two, Kohaku recalls his past. Will the couple end up going together?

title: Earring
overview: Now that it's official, Yoi struggles to understand how one should behave when dating someone.

title: A Goodnight Hug
overview: The gang enjoys Kobe as the couple begins to figure out their wants and needs in their relationship.

title: Another Prince
overview: Yoi contemplates spending more time with Kohaku for the last bit of their summer break, when...

title: The Empty Room
overview: Yoshiko, Kohaku's childhood friend, returns for the summer and invites him to dinner. What he finds out is...

title: In the Clear Moonlit Dusk
overview: Kohaku's insecurities get the best of him as he gets in a fight with Yoi. Will the couple make amends?
